name: Chex Muddy Buddies
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour cereal into a large bowl and set aside.
2. Melt the chocolate chips, peanut butter, and butter in a microwave or on top of the stove.
3. Add vanilla extract to the melted mixture.
4. Pour the chocolate mixture over the cereal and stir until all pieces are evenly coated.
5. Place the cereal with powdered sugar in a large plastic bag. Seal the bag and shake until all pieces are well coated.
6. Spread the Muddy Buddies on waxed paper to cool.
Source: Chex cereal advertisement, 05/15/94.
Note: These are very good!
